sizing_rule.note: Fixed fractional sizing applied uniformly to all trades based on total stake reinvestment principle. Specific percentage determined by geometric mean analysis (author did not specify exact f-value). This is Ralph Vince's reinvestment approach—risk same fraction of current equity on each trade regardless of outcome.

source_rule_text: Always trade a fixed fraction of your total stake on a reinvestment basis, regardless of whether individual trades are winners or losers.
